vocab.word: dedicate a significant chunk of time
vocab.meaning: dành ra một khoảng thời gian lớn
vocab.example: I usually dedicate a significant chunk of time each evening to reviewing my lecture notes.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: During exam season, I immerse myself in my research for at least eight hours a day.
Balancing my academic commitments with a part-time job requires meticulous planning.

vocab.meaning: các buổi học cường độ cao
vocab.example: I prefer short, intensive study sessions over long, unproductive hours of staring at a book.

vocab.meaning: thức khuya để học bài/làm việc
vocab.example: When a deadline approaches, I often have to burn the midnight oil to finish my assignments.
I find that I can absorb information much more effectively in the early hours of the morning.
I strictly allocate time for both self-study and collaborative group projects every day.
Currently, I am swamped with coursework, so I spend nearly all my waking hours in the library.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung cao độ nhất
vocab.example: I try to tackle the most demanding subjects during my hours of peak concentration.
Being a diligent student, I make it a point to study for at least four hours daily regardless of my mood.
